name: node-gauge
title: node-gauge
description:
terminal based horizontal progress bar
A nearly stateless terminal based horizontal gauge / progress bar.  This
library is a dependency for npmlog, a logger with custom levels and colored
output for Node.js
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-gauge because terminal based horizontal progress bar.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-gauge as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-gauge with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-gauge --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
